title: AuditEvent
description: Security-relevant audit event. Produced fire-and-forget by Auth, Servers, Chat, Voice and the Gateway to the audit.events topic; consumed by the Audit Service, which hash-chains and persists each event. Producers MUST NOT set prev_hash/hash — those are computed by the Audit Service.

event_id.description: Unique id of this event, set by the producer.

event_type.description: Dotted event name, e.g. auth.login.success, servers.member.kick.

timestamp.description: When the audited action occurred (UTC, ISO 8601).

actor.description: Who performed the action. Never contains credentials.

resource.description: What the action targeted, if applicable.

metadata.description: Event-specific fields. MUST NOT contain passwords, full JWTs or message content — identifiers and metadata only.
